claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is smaller than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: Peregrine falcon dive is slower than Speed of sound in air (~20°C).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h. Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h.

claims.statement: Suez Canal length is at least 3× longer than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Suez Canal length: 193 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are more UN member states than keys on a standard piano.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 193 states vs 88 keys.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened after Wikipedia launched.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. Wikipedia launched: 2001.
